programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Beware of the Oozy! / A Royal Adventure: During "Clean Up Orlanta Week", the Paq volunteers to clean up trash in the park much to Himari's displeasure. After filling up Queenie's loader, everyone heads to the dump a storm bursts overhead. When lighting strikes the trash, it unleashes a monster that leaves Himari alone to defeat / Prince Jaffa arrives in Orlanta from Kinshasa, Africa for an official visit and stays at Shaq's house. Despite strict orders by Prince Jaffa's chaperone to not leave the garage after a long day of Princely duties, Himari convinces Prince Jaffa to sneak out with her and Fleming to experience what it's like being a normal teenager.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - Shaq's Chicken Noodle Soup / Monster Truck Gronk: When Shaq comes down with a cold, the Paq decide to make him his mom's special chicken noodle soup to make him feel better. Queenie, Himari, and Gronk drive all over Orlanta trying to gather the ingredients, but it's not as easy as they thought it would be. / Jimmy Extreme, the rude driver of a huge monster truck, becomes Gronk's hero after a chance meeting. Gronk decides that he's going to also become a monster truck, so he starts modifying himself to be more like Jimmy's truck. As he spends more and more time with Jimmy, more than his looks change, threatening his relationship with the Paq.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage
programme.desc: Shaq's Garage - A Ring For Queenie / The Magic Box: Queenie's O-ring goes bad and is scared that she won't be able to run. The Paq meets a wizard who brings them on a quest to find a legendary ring. When bringing the ring back to garage it gets lost and the Paq has to find a different way to help Queenie. / When Penny The Great shows everyone her magic trick called the Magic Box, Himari decides to play a joke on the rest of the Shaq Paq by disappearing. She follows the Paq around while they search for her. When she reappears later, she realizes that she hurt her friends' feelings.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Belly of the Beast: The Skylanders and the cadets come together to fight the evil Fire Viper.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Who's Your Daddy?: One of Jet-Vac's eggs hatches, producing an evil baby greeble.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - Sheep(ball) Dreams: When Dreamcatcher gets amnesia, the Skylanders bring her back to the Academy in the hopes of reforming her.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Dadzilla / Tag Team Trouble: Fed up with Koopa's ways, Kootie Pie and Big Mouth bring a Hollywood movie monster to life and convince him he's their real dad. / After Toad fell asleep and a bag of coins have been taken, thinking Koopa has taken it, Toad gets his cousins to wrestle which King Koopa and Cheatsy's Sledge Brothers are also entering to win 1 million gold coins.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3
programme.desc: Super Mario Bros 3 - Do the Koopa / Kootie Pie Rocks: Luigi finds a map to the Doom Dancer music box which Mario and friends have to find it in Dark Land which can stop King Koopa and his Koopalings ruling the Mushroom Kingdom. / The Marios and Toad accompany the Princess to a Milli Vinilli concert in New York City, but Kottie Pie, jealous that's she's not going to the concert, kidnaps Rob and Fab for her own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - My Freaky Valentine, Part 3: With the potent powers of Claw of Hermos, Joey transforms Time Wizard into an almighty... hammer? Can Joey master the uncanny abilities of his new card to pound Mai's Harpie Ladies before they slash him to shreds?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - The Challenge: Professor Hawkins has discovered startling connections between the world's conundrums, the Orichalcos stones and an ancient lost civilization.

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - Pac's Very Scary Halloween - Part Two: The insidious brain-in-a-jar Doctor Pacenstein has stolen Pac's body and stuck our hero's grey matter (yellow matter, actually) in a jar!

programme.title: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures
programme.desc: Pac-Man and the Ghostly Adventures - New Girl in Town: When Spheros' and Betrayus' teenage niece visits Pacopolis, she and Pac become smitten.

programme.title: Skylanders Academy
programme.desc: Skylanders Academy - It Techs Two: Jet-Vac feels his place on the Skylanders is threatened by Sprocket and her tech abilities when she is brought onto the team to help.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita's brother, Rito Revolto, promises to destroy the Power Rangers as a late wedding present for his sister.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers search for the mythical sage Ninjor in an effort to restore their lost powers.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Rangers receive new Ninja Powers and new Zords to battle Rito Revolto.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita and Lord Zedd unleash Vampirus against the Power Rangers' new Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: The Hate Master causes the Power Rangers to fight among themselves and make plans to quit.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Aisha holds the secret to stopping the Hate Master and reuniting the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rito's love potion creates havoc in Angel Grove.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zedd and Rita capture Ninjor and his power source with plans to activate a set of dormant Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Zedd uses the kidnapped Kimberly to blackmail the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.desc: Kimberly's safety depends on the Rangers piloting Zedd's Zords.

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.sub-title: A Different Shade of Pink, Part 1

programme.title: Power Rangers
programme.sub-title: A Different Shade of Pink, Part 2
programme.desc: Rita and Zedd use Ninjor to bargain for the return of Katherine.

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.sub-title: Master Vile and the Matallic Armor, Part 1
programme.desc: Rita's father, Master Vile, arrives to do what she and Zedd have failed to do -- destroy the Rangers.

programme.desc: Master Vile and his evil crew appear to be winning the battle against the Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers

programme.desc: The Rangers decide that the only way to win against Master Vile is to journey to a distant galaxy.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Alien Rangers
programme.desc: Zordon calls on the Alien Rangers to help defend the Earth after the Power Rangers are made helpless.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus and Jetfire attack the ship, but can't stop the Hydra Cannon being deployed.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Hot Shot insists they should take vengeance on the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: With the Autobot ship ready to leave, Hot Shot refuses to let the children accompany them.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Transformers Prime deepens the epic mythology of both the AUTOBOTS and DECEPTICONS.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Optimus Prime and the Autobots investigate the return of the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When a life signal is received from Cliffjumper, the Autobots roll out and are met by newly-returned Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Bulkhead is on a mission to rescue Agent Fowler, who has been kidnapped by the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Omega Supreme becomes consumed with a personal vendetta against the Constructicons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: The Autobots and Decepticons are thrown through space to a strange world.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: En route back to Earth, the Autobots are captured and deactivated.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Four female Autobots come out of hiding to raid a Decepticon base on Cybertron for Energon Cubes.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When the city's hottest nightclub opens up, its patrons mysteriously start aiding the Decepticons.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Earth's most accomplished game hunter has his sights set on a new target: the head of Optimus Prime.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: To aid in their latest scheme, The Decepticons kidnap a scientist.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: It's Decepticon versus Decepticon when triple changers Astrotrain and Blitzwing decide to seize power.

programme.title: Mission Inplausible
programme.desc: As the Eye of Confusion's power threatens to unravel reality, Logan and Astrid are forced to confront their deepest fears in the Dream Forge.

programme.title: Music “Battle of the Stars”
programme.desc: Nova pulls off a series of pranks, leaving her friends scrambling and laughing. However, things take a dark turn when one of her pranks goes awry and sends the group into a terrifying situation.

programme.title: The Royal Blacksmiths
programme.desc: The four ninja go undercover as a dance troupe and enter a talent contest in their quest to win “The Blade Cup” where one of the fang blades is hidden.

programme.title: Marvel Superheroes
programme.desc: Loki arrives at Avengers Tower declaring he wants to be an Avenger. Our heroes are skeptical, but Iron Man decides to make Loki an ”Avenger In Training”. It's a great plan until Thanos arrives on Earth looking for Loki

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: Gorilla's Gone Wild
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue. The only problem is that the Lions don't like water ... at all!

programme.title: The Haunted and the Hunted!
programme.desc: Something mysterious lurking the jungle wrecks a construction site, and Hudson is convinced a ghost is responsible - but it might be something even more surprising.

programme.title: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: Laval and Li'Ella's relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Friends Reunite
programme.desc: Olly about how his obsession is affecting their relationships. Olly refuses to see the damage he's causing, but it becomes clear that he's lost touch with what really matters.

programme.title: All Of Nothing
programme.desc: The ninja and Sensei Wu try to infiltrate the Serpentines' inner sanctum and walk right into a trap, and when Lloyd's rescue mission fails, there is only one person who can help them, namely the evil Lord Garmadon – but can they trust him?

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Maximum Overload
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Marvel's Super Heroes take on a mischievous Loki and a team of super villains in an all-new LEGO adventure

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: The CHI Jackers
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen CHI. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of CHIMA have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof ” way to get CHI to the tribes.

programme.title: Symptoms!
programme.desc: Owen falls prey to the toxin of a poisonous prehistoric jungle flower and believes he's a raptor.

programme.title: Snow Way
programme.desc: Practicing for the local snow lodge's big snowboard race, Mia has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no biggie, but when she tries to resume practice, the normally fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! At the local snow lodge's Snowboard Meet, ace snowboarder Mia, trying to raise money for a new Heartlake City animal shelter, enters the fiercest race of all – the Boardercross. Then, while practicing, she has an accident and hurts her ankle. She insists it's no big deal, but once she heals and tries to resume practice, the usually fearless Mia finds she's now terrified of snowboarding! With the help of her Friends, she tries hard to overcome her fear, but her nightmarish visions of snowboard monsters and jeering snowmen have her shaking in her bed. She backs out of the race, disappointing her Friends and herself. Finally, when an avalanche traps Fiona, Mia is forced to overcome her fears and race to the rescue.

programme.title: The Shape of Motion
programme.desc: Arin's quest to find his parents takes an unexpected turn when he and the Ninja stumble upon a baby dragon in need.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sleet and Dingo plan to collect the taxes owed to Robotnik from the Duke of Velcronia but keep it for themselves.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: On a trip to Port Mobius, Sonic, Manic and Sonia are told that ships are sinking due to the Mobian sea-beast.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A group of Freedom Fighters is obliterated by a swarm of metallic fly-bots. When Manic goes looking for the insects, he is stung with serum.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: The sinister Robotnik blackmails Cyrus, an old friend of Sonic's, by holding his father hostage.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: A speed enhancing fluid deemed Sonic Tonic is created by Robotnik to make him as fast as Sonic so that he may finally catch him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner, named Bert Whoo, when Robotnik uses his henchbots to try to collect protection money. When the henchbots prove to be no match for Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.sub-title: Super Special Sonic Search and Smash Squad
programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts is exiled by Robotnik to a remote jungle, where he uses a giant baby ape to destroy villages. But Sonic exposes Coconuts as a robot, and the baby ape's real Dad takes Coconuts and the baby ape away for a spanking.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic turns detective to solve the mystery of his missing Red Sneakers--and just in time to get them back and stop Dr. Robotnik's latest attack on a peaceful Mobius village.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When S and G rocket to outerspace to mine a radioactive mineral from asteroids, Sonic and Tails stow away. Through a blunder by the robots, all are stranded in space, and Robotnik tries to blow all of them out of the stars.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Scratch and Grounder fiddle with Robotnik's Warpinating Warpifier and send Sonic and Tails into the world of a Mobius Fairy Tales book.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Wes Weasley returns to the Fortress, Coconuts tricks Robotnik into signing an IOU so he can buy thousands of Mobiums worth of magic tricks to use on Sonic. In the end, Sonic goes free, and Robotnik is forced to pay Wes the massive IOU debt.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A thief breaks into the Shane Gang HQ looking for the fabled "Shane Treasure" - a portion of which she believes belongs to her. The thief escapes with nothing, but Eli does manage to find a treasure chest. To unlock it, the thief and the gang will need to travel to a remote, dangerous cavern to find a special slug. The journey is fraught with peril, and when they finally open the box, what's inside is not at all what they were expecting...

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Notorious con man Gar Rivelle has many convinced he has discovered the way to a secret land... a land that seems to be the surface! Eli uncovers the truth - Gar is getting his information from a coded Shane diary. Keeping the surface secret is Eli's number one mission, so he steals the diary from Gar, sparking an all-out siege on the Shane HQ. Eli realizes that for him to continue in Slugterra, he's going to have to confide his greatest secret to his friends.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Driven by his intense slug phobia, scientist Quentin Kozinski has invented mechanical slugs. Armed with this fearsome arsenal, he sets out to prove that science can beat any slug and any slinger including the Shane Gang! But Eli is determined to prove that no thinking, living thing can ever be bested by a machine.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: A mysterious slugslinging master appears for the first time in 20 years. Though old, this slinger is an amazing battler incredibly fast and the master of an unstoppable slinging technique. Eli, Kord, Trixie and Pronto all want to study with the master and learn this awesome move. But so does Dr. Blakk's protégé Twist! Now Eli must face off against Twist and prevent the master from choosing a villain for a student.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Blakk has hired Brutale - a thug as brutal as his name - to build a Deep Water Rig to drill for Dark Water at the bottom of the Cavern Sea. Needing some water-breathing labor for the job, Brutale steals Marvolio Drake's reptilian pirate crew. Desperate to get his men back, Drake forms an unlikely alliance with the Shane Gang, who are just as desperate to shut the Dark Water rig down.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Using some stolen Shadow Clan tech, Dana Por is able slip in and out of any cavern in Slugterra - and rob them blind! But when she makes the mistake of stealing from Dr. Blakk, Eli is the only one who can protect her from The Gentleman, a suave but deadly mercenary Blakk hires to take back what was stolen from him - and bring back the scalp of the girl who stole it!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and Kord have been trying to create a fusion shot: two slugs shot at exactly the same time that can merge their powers! But they'll need to mod Eli's blaster to handle it. In search of the one missing part that will complete Eli's Double Barreled Blaster, the gang journey to the Scrap Heap, a junk yard cavern of epic proportions. Finding the part isn't easy. Getting out with it alive past Boss Ember and his Scrap Force is nearly impossible.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Eli and the Shane Gang find themselves trapped in the Deep Caverns underneath Slugterra they discover a whole new type of danger threatening to escape. Allowing it past the barrier would mean unprecedented peril - not only for Slugterra, but our world above too!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Armed with his powerful new weapon the Gatling Blaster, Blakk's unstoppable battle train threatens to run roughshod over all of Slugterra - unless Eli can master his new Double Barrel Blaster and come up with a powerful fusion move in time to stop it.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Locke and Lode have run roughshod over a cavern and The Shane Gang aim to kick them out. But the townspeople have their own hero to clean up the town - none other than the King of Sling, a pompous Slugslinger the gang has bested on a number of occasions. There is no way he'll survive against two of Blakk's minions, but Eli can't intervene without humiliating the king! So the Shane Gang decide to work behind the scenes to make the king victorious. That is until Dr. Blakk himself arrives.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang's been captured by the zombifying Mr. Saturday! Locked up in Stalagmite 17, they are helpless as Dr. Blakk begins the trip there to collect them. Only one hope remains... the two members of the Shane Gang Saturday didn't capture: Pronto and Burpy. Can this mismatched pair pull off an impressive prison break?

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang follow Diablos Nacho to Molemound - the Molenoid home cavern. Pronto doesn't want to go - and not because he's in trouble. It turns out Pronto is the rightful KING of the Molenoids. He's been ducking the crown for years since the king's main responsibility is settling arguments and fixing leaky plumbing. But Pronto must play king for a day while the Shane Gang follows Nacho into the great Molenoid library to stop him from taking a valuable map.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Our heroes are lured into an elaborate game by a twisted villain calling himself the Game Master. The Shane Gang must use every bit of skill they have to pass each level, but there is a devious twist: every slug they fire is captured, with the promise that they'll see them again only if they manage to make it to the end. That's becoming all the more difficult with fewer and fewer slugs.

He doesn't count on the intelligence of the newcomer, who wins the admiration of his fellow creatures... until, eventually finding him too "weird," they decide to make him undergo an intensive course in idiocy to integrate him. Needless to say, it doesn't go well!

programme.title: Xploration Nature Knows Best
programme.desc: Marine biologist Danni Washington hosts this series that explains how nature has helped to inspire technology that people use on a daily basis. Some of the nature-inspired innovations include airplanes inspired by birds and helicopters that were influenced by dragonflies. The show also introduces viewers to people involved in creating innovations that are based on animals, including biologists who study the behavior of ants, architects designing "living buildings" and roboticists who are making their designs bigger and stronger based on animals.

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los grupos individuales están convencidos de que pueden construir un futuro mejor por separado, pero la pérdida de un miembro los lleva a unir fuerzas. Se revela una amenaza perturbadora y peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Por primera vez en años, las cuatro comunidades se reúnen durante la feria que organiza el Reino. Alpha aprovecha la ocasión para infiltrarse de incógnito entre los visitantes de la feria.

programme.desc: El Chema hace que Rutila grabe un video como prueba de vida para Aurelio, ya que quiere hacer negocios. Andrew obtiene material donde el general Garnica aparece con drogas, con el que pretende chantajearlo.

programme.desc: Verónica activa un nuevo plan en el que Maximiliano hace una serie de denuncias contra Antonia y Aníbal, por haberlo coaccionado a cederles las tierras del Chamuco. Villegas enfurece.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.sub-title: La verdad de la patrona Dantés
programme.desc: Verónica se presenta ante Alejandro como Gabriela. Aníbal recibe una llamada de Constanza y cae al suelo con un dolor en el pecho. Alejandro Beltrán escucha todas las maldades de su madre.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.sub-title: Sofía es blanco de un atentado
programme.desc: El gobernador impide que Sofía escape. En los alrededores del hotel, los hombres de don Chente le tienden una emboscada a la primera dama. Eliza y los niños sufren un disgusto como inmigrantes.

programme.title: Al otro lado del muro
programme.desc: El gobernador descubre que Sofía tiene un amante. Un video de las cámaras de seguridad lo deja mudo. Pastrana le pisa los talones a Joel, a Sofía y a su hija en su escape a la frontera.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosaura cada vez está más reconciliada con su pasado y Andrea recibe una muestra de ello. José Ignacio se resigna con lo que le anuncia Bárbara. Rodolfo y Margaret desconfían uno del otro.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: José Ignacio busca a Rosa, le habla sobre su situación y le confirma sus sentimientos por ella. Bárbara planifica cómo mantener el engaño de su embarazo. Descubren dónde tienen a Lucía.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: José Ignacio está desesperado por encontrar a Lucía, tanto que está por dañar la operación. Sergio huye, pasa por el apartamento a buscar sus cosas y dinero, pero alguien llega a por él.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa se aparece en Venus y confronta a Rodolfo, lo acusa y le informa de sus intenciones. José Ignacio encuentra a Sergio muerto y llama a la policía, pero ahora es el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Bárbara recibe un pronóstico delicado: tiene que cuidarse mucho, pues podría perder el bebé. Martín le dice a su papá que se cuide, pero Rodolfo llama traidor a su hijo y el cerco se cierra a su alrededor.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosaura trata de hacerlo, pero no se atreve a decirle a Rosa la verdad, pues teme que su hija la odie. Bárbara trata de sacarle provecho a su condición. Rosa busca a José Ignacio para ofrecerle apoyo.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: Rosa decide confrontar a Margaret sobre lo que le hizo a Rosaura, le dice que tiene pruebas y a un testigo. Gerardo reacciona ante Bárbara. Andrea cuestiona el documento que firmó Rosaura.

programme.title: Rosa diamante
programme.desc: La policía le hace una visita a Ramón, quien da la información que tiene con lujo de detalles. Rosa llega en el momento menos adecuado. Un abogado confirma la legalidad de la firma de Rosaura.

programme.desc: Seis famosos son reunidos en una azotea para enfrentar los retos más atrevidos, graciosos, chuscos y hasta arriesgados en donde el glamour y la fama se quedan atrás para dar paso a la diversión y el buen humor.

programme.title: Armamento
programme.desc: Las abejas, las termitas, las hormigas y las avispas pueden formar ejércitos para construir un hogar elaborado.

programme.title: La Ultima Frontera
programme.desc: En el Parque Nacional Katmai, osos pardos costeros se reúnen para comer salmón mientras migran de regreso a los ríos y arroyos donde nacieron

programme.title: Pesca como un Oso
programme.desc: El equipo se dirige tierra adentro a una sección del río para observar las diferentes familias mientras pescan.

programme.title: Un Ecosistema Funcional
programme.desc: Durante una pausa en la actividad de osos y salmones, Casey y la tripulación deciden dirigirse tierra adentro en busca del desove de peces.

programme.title: El Lobo y la Tormenta
programme.desc: Después de ver un lobo en la distancia y huellas en la orilla, el equipo se dirige tierra adentro en busca de más pistas sobre el paradero del lobo.

programme.title: Vecinos Nuevos y Viejos
programme.desc: Casey y el equipo buscan la familia del cachorro perdido. Esperan que, al encontrarla, el cachorro también los haya encontrado.

programme.title: Nada como el Hogar
programme.desc: A medida que finaliza su expedición, la actividad del salmón y los osos disminuye, aunque todavía quedan algunos en la zona.

programme.title: Disposición de la Tierra
programme.desc: Casey y su equipo llegan a Nepal y se encuentran con Rajan Chadhary, un guía de tigres que los lleva por el Parque Nacional Bardiya

programme.title: En el Dormitorio del Tigre
programme.desc: Casey y Rajan discuten tácticas: ¿esperar a los tigres o seguirlos en la jungla? Observan a los raros felinos cerca del lecho del río

programme.title: Ratas
programme.desc: Nueva York, una de las ciudades más infestadas de América, tiene cerca de 2 millones de roedores. Así combate la ciudad esta plaga

programme.title: Planeta parásito
programme.desc: Los parásitos tienen mala reputación pero son esenciales para un ecosistema saludable en todo el mundo.

programme.title: Encuentros con pulpos
programme.desc: El pulpo es lo más parecido a un alienígena que hemos visto en la Tierra. Viajemos al Oceáno Pacífico para conocer más acerca de ellos.

programme.title: Las superbabosas marinas
programme.desc: Los invertebrados más coloridos del océano, los nudibraquios o babosas de mar, se adaptan increíblemente para sobrevivir en el océano.

programme.title: El renacimiento del bosque subacuático
programme.desc: Los bosques de algas marinas ayudan a albergar mayor variedad y diversidad de plantas y animales que casi cualquier otra comunidad marina.

programme.title: La ciencia de la ternura
programme.desc: La domesticación transformó a los lobos en perros. Nuevos hallazgos muestran que los perros levantan las cejas más que los lobos. ¿Por qué?

programme.title: Antártida: ciencia bajo cero
programme.desc: La Antártida es misteriosa e inexplorada. Científicos del Instituto Antártico Chileno estudian el cambio climático en condiciones extremas.

programme.title: El Amazonas incendiado
programme.desc: Más de 60,000 incendios azotaron el Amazonas en 2019. ¿Qué los causó? ¿Cómo afectarán la crisis climática? ¿Se recuperará el Amazonas?

programme.title: El Hombre al que no Pudieron Matar
programme.desc: Cuando la pandilla 'Murder Trust' decidió matar a un don nadie para cobrar su seguro, no imaginaron lo difícil que sería llevarlo a cabo

programme.title: Rompecabezas Coloridos
programme.desc: Acompañen al anfitrión Nick Uhas y sus invitados mientras prueban el arco iris científico.

programme.desc: Acompañen al anfitrión Nick Uhas y sus invitados mientras rompen los lazos atómicos que conectan nuestro mundo.

programme.title: No Crean lo que Ven
programme.desc: Acompañen al anfitrión Nick Uhas y sus invitados mientras hacen que la ciencia parezca brujería.

programme.title: El Sonido de la Ciencia

programme.desc: Dimitriy Polyakov, el mayor espía de Occidente en la Guerra Fría, fue un general ruso de inteligencia militar que se volvió contra su país

programme.desc: Un oficial de la KGB que trabajaba para el servicio de inteligencia francés, Vladimir Vetrov, robó espionaje técnico y económico soviético.

programme.title: El Proyecto Romeo
programme.desc: Gabrielle Kleim, una de las muchas mujeres engañadas para compartir inteligencia por amor a instancias de Marcus Wolf y sus "Espías Romeo".

programme.title: Una familia de diez
programme.desc: Una discusión motivada por los celos pone en peligro el matrimonio de Plutarco y Gaby. Justito corre el riesgo de perder a su familia y Martina presenta a su novio, un chofer de microbús mayor que ella.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche: Cita a ciegas

programme.title: Vencer el pasado

programme.title: Vencer el pasado
programme.desc: Darío entristece tras saber que Rodrigo ha decidido vivir con Priscila. Lisandro se niega a aceptar la renuncia de Renata. Fabiola teme que Mariluz desista de su contrato y no se embarace. Lucio ayuda a que Carmen no sea encarcelada.

programme.title: Vencer el pasado

programme.title: Duke Ellington
programme.sub-title: Duke Ellington: Jazz from Newport, Brussels, 1973
programme.desc: In 1956, Duke Ellington and his Orchestra performed a legendary set at the third annual Newport Jazz Festival. It was tenor saxophonist Paul Gonsalves' outstanding 27-chorus solo on “Diminuendo and Crescendo in Blue” that revitalized Ellington's career. The success generated during that performance carried him for the rest of his life. By 1973, festivals carrying the Newport name were organized all over the world. Less than a year before his death, Ellington and his Orchestra, with Gonsalves still in the fold, appeared in Brussels to deliver a timeless performance before a highly appreciative crowd.

programme.title: Dave Brubeck Trio, Cannonball Adderley Quintet, Charles Mingus Sextet & Jimmy Smith
programme.sub-title: Smith, Adderley, Brubeck, Mingus - Newport Jazz F.
programme.desc: The Newport Jazz Festival, first established in the North-American town of Newport, Rhode Island in the summer of 1954, has now grown to become one of the largest multi-day celebrations of jazz worldwide. It has resulted in numerous famous live albums from top-rate jazz stars, and has spawned several worldwide tours, including editions of the Newport Jazz Festival in Rotterdam, The Netherlands. In October 1972, an outstanding lineup played shoulder-to-shoulder at the 7th Newport Jazz Festival held in Rotterdam's then-recently built concert venue De Doelen. These four masterful groups consisted of alto saxophonist "Cannonball" Adderley and his quintet (Nat Adderley on cornet, George Duke on keyboards, Walter Booker on bass, and Roy McCurdy on drums), Hammond organist Jimmy Smith and his band (Art Farmer on flugelhorn, Illinois Jacquet on tenor saxophone, Kenny Burrell on guitar, Clark Terry on trumpet, and Roy Haynes on drums), pianist Dave Brubeck and his trio (Jack Six on bass, Alan Dawson on drums) with accompaniment from Paul Desmond on alto saxophone and Gerry Mulligan on baritone saxophone, and bassist Charles Mingus and his group (Joe Gardner on trumpet, Hamiet Bluiett on baritone saxophone, John Foster on piano, Roy Brooks on drums) with the great high-note trumpeter Cat Anderson as a guest.

programme.title: Milt Jackson
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Fats Domino
programme.sub-title: Fats Domino - The North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. American singer and pianist Fats Domino gave an unforgettable performance at the North Sea Jazz Festival of 1980. Domino was one of the pioneers of rock and roll music, selling more than 65 million records and having 11 top hits between 1955 and 1960.

programme.title: Woody Herman
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Jazzmeia Horn
programme.desc: Vocalist Jazzmeia Horn's 2019 Malta Jazz Festival appearance was a celebration of jazz's future, infused with the soul of its past. Featuring Keith Brown (piano), Rashaan Carter (bass), Irwin Hall (flute and saxophone), and Anwar Marshall (drums), the young singer's performance was a reminder of jazz's enduring power to speak to the heart. Situated at the Valletta waterfront outside Our Lady of Liesse Church, Horn's concert was a truly spellbinding experience.

programme.title: Joe Zawinul
programme.desc: 'Münchner Klaviersommer' was an annual concerts series that took place from 1981 to 1998 in Munich, Germany. Although the festival's name suggests a strong focus on piano music, it featured countless famous musicians from jazz and classical music – not just pianists. In 1985, Viennese keyboardist Joe Zawinul was one of the artists appearing at this festival. Zawinul performed on a huge synthesizer outfit in this concert, recorded live at the Kongressaal in Munich, Germany.

programme.title: David Grimal & Les Dissonances
programme.desc: Les Dissonances is a collective of artists founded by violinist David Grimal in 2004. The conductorless ensemble consists of musicians from the most prestigious European orchestras, international soloists, and young talents. In this performance, Les Dissonances play Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Violin Concerto No. 4 in D major, K. 218. Leading violinist Grimal features as the soloist. With the exception of the first violin concerto, Mozart composed his other four violin concertos in 1775 at a time when he was concertmaster at the Salzburg court. Among his five concertos, Violin Concerto No. 4 is one of the best-known. This performance was recorded at Cité de la Musique, France, in 2014.

programme.title: Eliane Reyes
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Matthias Goerne, Vilde Frang, Nicolas Altstaedt & Stathis Karapanos
programme.sub-title: J. S. Bach - Arias, solos, and duets
programme.desc: Baritone Matthias Goerne teams up with violinist Vilde Frang, cellist Nicolas Altstaedt, flutist Stathis Karapanos, and harpsichordist Michaela Hasselt in this program dedicated to the music of J. S. Bach. They perform baritone arias from Bach's most beautiful cantatas, as well as solo pieces and duets. On the program are Sonata No. 3 in C major for violin solo, BWV 1005 arias ‘Hier, in meines Vaters Stätte', BWV 32 and ‘Die Welt mit allen Königreichen', BWV 59 Suite No. 5 in C minor for cello solo, BWV 1011 ‘Wenn Trost und Hülf ermangeln muß', BWV 117 ‘Ja, ja, ich halte Jesum fest', BWV 157 Invention No. 7 in E minor, BWV 778 Invention in A major, BWV 783 and ‘Welt ade, ich bin dein müde', BWV 158. This performance was recorded at St. Mary's Church in Wittenberg, Germany.

programme.title: Daniel Barenboim
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Václav Luks & Collegium 1704
programme.desc: J. S. Bach's six Brandenburg Concerto's belong to his best-known works. The composer wrote these concertos between 1711 and 1720 and dedicated them in 1721 to Christian Ludwig, Margrave of Brandenburg. In celebration of the pieces' 300th anniversary, Czech harpsichordist and conductor Václav Luks and the renowned Baroque ensemble Collegium 1704 recorded all six Brandenburg Concertos on historical instruments in 2021. The concertos are based on the Italian concerto grosso form, in which a group of solo instruments is set against a large ensemble. Bach's Brandenburg Concertos feature remarkable combinations of solo instruments and virtuoso solos. This performance was recorded at the Hall of Mirrors in the Köthen Castle, Germany.

programme.title: Herbert Blomstedt & Gewandhausorchester Leipzig
programme.sub-title: Symphonies in D by Mozart and Voríšek
programme.desc: Conductor Herbert Blomstedt and the Gewandhausorchester take us on a musical journey to the Czech Republic in this 2020 concert from Leipzig's Gewandhaus. The program opens with Bohemian composer Jan Václav Hugo Voríšek's Symphony in D major, Op. 23 (1821). Although the composition – Voríšek's only symphony – was never performed during the composer's lifetime, it has become one of his most-performed works today. Also on the program is Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart's Symphony No. 38 in D major, K. 504. This work, which premiered while Mozart was visiting Prague in 1787, is often referred to as the ‘Prague Symphony'.

programme.title: Seong-Jin Cho
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer, Budapest Festival Orchestra & Richard Goode
programme.sub-title: Beethoven - Symphonies and Piano Concerto No. 4
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra (BFO) in a concert program dedicated to the music of Ludwig van Beethoven. The program opens with the composer's Symphony No. 1 in C major, Op. 21. Afterward, Fischer conducts Beethoven's Piano Concerto No. 4 in G major, Op. 58, in which Richard Goode features as the soloist. The acclaimed American pianist (1943) is known for his interpretations of the Beethoven repertoire. Goode recorded all five Beethoven piano concertos with the BFO and Fischer, earning him exceptional critical acclaim and a Grammy Award nomination. As an encore, Goode performs the Sarabande from J. S. Bach's Partita in B-flat major, BWV 825. The program closes with Beethoven's famous Symphony No. 5 in C minor, Op. 67. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on January 29, 2017.

programme.desc: The Apple Music Festival (formerly known as the iTunes Festival) was a music concert series held by Apple, Inc. inaugurated in 2007.

programme.title: Michael Bublé
programme.desc: Caught in the Act is the second live album released by Canadian jazz crooner Michael Bublé. It was filmed and recorded at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles. The filmed concert was aired on PBS as an episode of Great Performances, and the show was subsequently released on DVD along with the audio CD to create the album package, although the audio disc only featured eight of the songs from the concert. The concert featured a few guest artists, including Laura Pausini, Chris Botti, and with an unexpected comedic banter with Bublé, Josh Groban.

programme.title: Ellie Goulding
programme.desc: Do not just be fascinated by the beauty and girlishness of this bright-eyed Englishwoman. Ellie Goulding has a lot more to offer fans of good pop music and its electronic variations. Since releasing her first album in 2010, Ellie has traveled the world to showcase her talents, both in the voice and in the composition of her songs. These talents can be seen in this show at the iTunes Festival in London, with special mention for the songs "Burn", "Halcyon", "Lights" and "My Blood".

programme.title: Chic
programme.desc: ITunes Festival, is an annual music festival that takes place over a month in London. Sponsored by Apple Inc., it had its first edition in 2007

programme.title: Billy Idol
programme.desc: BILLY IDOL an English rock musician, songwriter and actor. Born in Stanmore, Middlesex, Idol first achieved fame in the punk rock era as a member of the band Generation X. Idol then embarked on a successful solo career, and was a member of the MTV-driven "Second British Invasion" of the United States. A series of music videos for songs such as "Dancing with Myself", "White Wedding", "Rebel Yell" and "Eyes Without a Face" made him one of the first MTV stars. Idol continues to tour with guitarist Steve Stevens. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic artist.

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Fiji Islands 2
programme.desc: "Flying over Fiji Islands 2" offers a 1-hour and 42-minute journey across Fiji's majestic landscapes. Combining nature sounds with ambient music by The Cynic Project, it features smooth ground-level and aerial shots, concluding with a breathtaking real-time sunset over the sea.

programme.title: Flying Over Bermuda
programme.desc: "Flying Over Bermuda" offers an 80-minute relaxation journey above Bermuda's turquoise waters and coastlines in 4K Ultra HD. Filmed by Noel Thomas, it features sights like Horseshoe Bay and the Vixen shipwreck, with music by The Cynic Project and other artists

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Sunny Getaways

programme.title: A Day in the Caribbean 3
programme.desc: A Day in the Caribbean transports viewers miles away from it all, to the gorgeous tropical island of Antigua. Arriving just at dawn, you'll enjoy a stunning golden sunrise and rainbow, followed by a couple hours of beautiful beach scenes as you explore the beautiful resort surroundings. Abundant, vibrant vistas will instantly transform your screen into a window to the glorious Caribbean - with nothing but the pure sounds of nature to accompany it. (Music version coming soon though)

programme.title: Rainbow Reef Relaxation 2
programme.desc: Sit back, relax and enjoy the dazzling world of coral reefs in 4K you embark on a journey through some of the most vibrant underwater reefs on our blue planet - including many scenes which no longer look like this due to coral bleaching. From the cinematographer: "The footage for this film was shot over a period of some years in French Polynesia, Micronesia, Indonesia and East Timor. Unfortunately there are not that vibrant anymore today. Coral reefs have suffered from the rise of water temperature, rise in acidity, destructive fishing methods and severe storms caused by climate change." - Peter Schneider. "Rainbow Reef Relaxation" is a 3-hour long, sweeping yet majestic & vibrant underwater journey to the world's most beautiful lagoons, as captured by Nature Relaxation collaborator Peter Schneider (Underwatercam) paired with ambient underwater sounds and brand new ambient music by the Cynic Project. Filmed in High Definition several years ago, thanks to its age this film offers magical glimpses of an underwater world that is bursting with life, color, and beauty.

programme.title: Four Seasons: Best Of
programme.desc: A kaleidoscopic journey through a shimmering summer, a cozy fall, a breathtaking winter, and a glowing spring.

programme.title: Zen Moment

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Earth And Stars E1 — An awe-inspiring collection of art that captures the beauty of our Earth and the wonders of the stars above. Elemental sounds of nature ebb and flow with percussions, acoustic guitars, and gentle swaying synths throughout this sonic landscape.

programme.title: Fresh Awakening
programme.desc: Urban Landscapes E1 — Discover the artistic pulse that beats within the soul of the city! Captivating cityscapes and skylines, alive with movement and bold architectural beauty, showcase the essence of modern life and exude the electric energy through the vibrant hues.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Painters' Showcase S1E1 — Extraordinary paintings hand-selected by the Loupe team.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E1 — Dive into a mesmerizing symphony of color and form with this bold abstract art collection. Immerse yourself in a journey where shapes dance, colors converse, and the music paints a cinematic soundscape occupying the space between mirage and reality.

programme.title: Morning Inspiration
programme.desc: Striking Abstracts S1E2: Cinematice Dimensions — Immerse yourself in a visual journey where shapes dance and colors converse, inviting you to redefine the way you perceive art. Dare to experience the extraordinary with soft and deep house beats.

programme.title: Shades Of Color: Shades Of Teal
programme.desc: Shades Of Color S1E9: Shades of Teal — Step into a world of calm serenity where each piece expertly utilizes the soothing shade of teal to evoke a sense of tranquility & relaxation. From serene oceanscapes to abstract compositions, be transported & unwind in a realm of peace and harmony.

programme.title: Red, White, And Blue
programme.desc: Red, White, And Blue — A vibrant art collection featuring patriotic palettes, bold expressions, and dynamic compositions that celebrate the American spirit, culture, and creativity —honoring freedom, unity, and the diverse artistic voices.
